message:
Command `# wrapper_run has 8afc8346 as PDK_ROOT too. Both run dirs have old PDK.
# The --last-run picks pnr_run_v2 (most recent). We patched pnr_run_v2/resolved.json.
# But validation still shows 8afc8346 and v1.6.0.
# This means librelane IGNORES our patched resolved.json and re-resolves from config.json + PDK.
# The 8afc8346 paths come from the PDK resolving to that hash.
# 
# KEY INSIGHT: librelane re-resolves config.json each time. The PDK hash in paths comes from
# the PDK itself. If /nc/pdk now only has 0fe599b2, why is 8afc8346 appearing?
# Check if the PDK symlink points to the correct version
ls /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/
echo "---sky130A dir---"
ls /nc/pdk/ | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:

# The 8afc8346 paths come from the PDK resolving to that hash.
# 
# KEY INSIGHT: librelane re-resolves config.json each time. The PDK hash in paths comes from

# Check if the PDK symlink points to the correct version
ls /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/
echo "---sky130A dir---"
ls /nc/pdk/ | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# wrapper_run has 8afc8346 as PDK_ROOT too. Both run dirs have old PDK.
# The --last-run picks pnr_run_v2 (most recent). We patched pnr_run_v2/resolved.json.
# But validation still shows 8afc8346 and v1.6.0.
# This means librelane IGNORES our patched resolved.json and re-resolves from config.json + PDK.
# The 8afc8346 paths come from the PDK resolving to that hash.
# 
# KEY INSIGHT: librelane re-resolves config.json each time. The PDK hash in paths comes from
# the PDK itself. If /nc/pdk now only has 0fe599b2, why is 8afc8346 appearing?
# Check if the PDK symlink points to the correct version
ls /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/
echo "---sky130A dir---"
ls /nc/pdk/ | head -5
